reviews.review_description: i like the game, but the steam version looks so much better. can we expect a quest 3 graphics update?

reviews.review_title: Much more than $5 worth of fun
reviews.review_description: Wonderful graphics and lots of fun. Hope this developer continues to create games for Quest that are as good as their high quality games for iPhone.

This should be in every Trick or Treater’s, (and their parents), bag this Halloween.

With its endless waves and straight forward gameplay it feels like an old arcade game from the 1980’s while looking like a modern VR game. 

The graphics are beautiful and the controls are precise and responsive.

(The only glitch I ran into is before you’ve scored on a leader board, the board says “Error” instead of showing you other people’s scores.  After you’ve played a game with and without a laser sight, both boards are fine so it’s a very minor glitch.)

reviews.review_title: A new kind of ZOMBIE Shooter
reviews.review_description:
I enjoy shooting galleries in real life as well as in VR and this one tickled my funny bone!  The standard birds and other animals in a shooting gallery are ZOMBIEFIED! 

It's a silly yet very fun game to play.  I'm 60 years old and still found myself laughing as I played this several times in a row.  I even did my first livestream on FB (late at night) playing this game.  

LOVE the theme, the music, and the sound effects of this game.  I had the top 4 scores on the leaderboard for the first four times I played it.

It is beautiful, and the play is smooth, but it is a demo at best. Just not enough here to be worth more than maybe $1 phone app.  To be fair, that's all it is, a $1 phone app ported to VR.  Has a ton of potential, but I just don't see the value.

Very fun game and not as easy as it looks in videos. 
since the targets are moving and some targets can take 2 or 3 shots it gets more and more difficult over time but it's addictive.

it has online ranking with & without laser sight to compete with other player. 

I hope there will be more theaters with other zombirds in the future.

The game was recommended to me and I bought it because I liked the look of it. After that I was really surprised and had a lot more fun than i thought . Shooting is fun, the graphics are great, everything is beautifully designed, and the Halloween music is also very good. There are several waves, the Zombirds are getting faster and new ones are coming and trying to kidnap the pumpkin babies. Trying to keep the hit combo and the powerups are also very good. There are different levels of difficulty and high score lists. The game does nothing wrong and is definitely worth the money. I would be happy about new locations and zombirds.
I love horror I love Halloween and I have to requalify every 6 months it keeps my stamina up for the gun range and it's fun I love it I love it I love it I love it Happy Halloween

reviews.review_title: A fun little shooter for a decent price
reviews.review_description:
Came across this game while taking my daily look at the latest AppLab games. 

A well presented, graphically pleasing little shooter with fun sound FX that keeps you coming back to improve your leaderboard score.

Definitely worth the £3.99 asking price.

Find us on Facebook where I've posted a gameplay video - Group name "Ridoculus - Oculus Quest / SideQuest / App Lab"

reviews.review_title: Polished enough for the main store
reviews.review_description: I was attracted by the graphics because they are my cup of tea. Such a fun style! I really like it. The sounds of the birds and the cries of the little pumpkin kids that you need to protect are are cute. It's a simple shooter so far (I'm early days, maybe it changes in higher levels) but it becomes challenging very quickly with lots to shoot at it. Great for kids and anyone who likes this spooky style and wants something less stressful to play around with. A no-brainer at this price.
